# Beeline Sprinkler Repair

> Family owned, licensed and insured irrigation company serving the Treasure Valley, Idaho since 2015. Sprinkler repair, new installation, winterization, spring turn-on, backflow service, main and drain replacement, valve repair, and controller replacement across Nampa, Boise, Meridian, Caldwell, Eagle, Kuna, Star, and Middleton.

Beeline Sprinkler Repair is a family owned and operated irrigation company based in Nampa, Idaho. Founded in 2015 by Mark Rust. Known for honest pricing, same-day service availability, and transparency — diagnosing first and giving customers a straight answer before any work begins. 150+ five-star Google reviews, BBB accredited, Idaho Registered Contractor, fully insured.

Contact: (208) 880-2712 | beelinesprinklerrepair@gmail.com | 5606 W Amity Rd, Nampa, ID 83687 | Hours: Monday–Friday 8am–6pm

Services offered: Sprinkler Repair, New Sprinkler System Installation, Spring Turn-On, Winterization and Blowout, Main and Drain Replacement, Backflow Testing and Replacement, Valve Repair, Controller Replacement, Head Replacement, Emergency Sprinkler Repair, Monthly Service Plans ($35-$55/month).

Pricing: Most repairs run $100-$300. Monthly service plans start at $35/month for 1-5 zones, $45/month for 6-10 zones, $55/month for 11-15 zones. Plans include monthly checkup, spring turn-on, fall blowout, and priority scheduling.

## Service Pages

- [Sprinkler Repair](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/sprinkler-repair.html): General sprinkler repair services across the Treasure Valley
- [New Installation](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/sprinkler-installation.html): New sprinkler system installation for residential and new construction
- [Spring Turn-On](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/spring-turn-on.html): Spring irrigation startup and inspection service
- [Winterization](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/winterization.html): Fall sprinkler blowout and winterization
- [Main and Drain](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/main-and-drain.html): Main line and drain replacement
- [Backflow](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/backflow.html): Backflow testing, repair, and replacement
- [Valve Repair](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/valve-repair-treasure-valley.html): Irrigation valve repair and replacement
- [Controller Replacement](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/controller-replacement.html): Sprinkler controller and timer replacement
- [Head Replacement](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/sprinkler-head-replacement-treasure-valley.html): Sprinkler head repair and replacement
- [Emergency Service](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/emergency.html): Emergency sprinkler repair
- [Service Plans](https://www.beelinesprinklerrepair.com/plans.html): Monthly irrigation maintenance plans
